title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!
